summary: Bug fix verification: ISO/Wishlist separation - GET /api/iso endpoint now correctly filters out WISHLIST items using {$ne: 'WISHLIST'}. All endpoints working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/iso (line 108) includes status filter {$ne: 'WISHLIST'} - correctly excludes wishlist items
VERIFIED: GET /api/users/{username}/iso (line 403) also excludes WISHLIST items with same filter
VERIFIED: GET /api/users/{username}/dreaming (line 415) only returns WISHLIST items with filter {status: 'WISHLIST'}
VERIFIED: PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote endpoint (lines 127-134) changes status from WISHLIST to OPEN with HIGH priority
VERIFIED: POST /api/iso (lines 83-104) creates items with WISHLIST status by default (line 99)
VERIFIED: POST /api/composer/iso (lines 484-509) creates items with OPEN status (line 506)
VERIFIED: Frontend ProfilePage Dreaming tab (lines 724-740) has 'Actively Searching' button calling PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote
VERIFIED: Frontend compiles without errors (ESLint warnings only)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI loads, tabs work, ISO separation verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data. Created and cleaned up test items during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ISO/Wishlist bug fix verified. GET /api/iso and GET /users/{username}/iso now correctly filter out WISHLIST items. POST /api/iso defaults to WISHLIST status, POST /api/composer/iso creates with OPEN status. Promote endpoint works to move items from Dreaming (WISHLIST) to ISO (OPEN). Demo user has 1 OPEN ISO (Pink Floyd - Dark Side of the Moon). Frontend 'Actively Searching' button exists but no WISHLIST items to test with currently.

get_api_iso_excludes_wishlist.details: GET /api/iso returns only OPEN status items, correctly excludes WISHLIST

put_iso_promote_endpoint_exists.details: PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote endpoint returns 404 for invalid ID (endpoint exists)

promote_changes_status_to_open.details: Created WISHLIST item, promoted it, verified status changed to OPEN and moved from dreaming to ISO

post_api_iso_defaults_wishlist.details: POST /api/iso creates with WISHLIST status by default

frontend_compiles.details: yarn build successful with only ESLint warnings

frontend_iso_tab_ui.details: ISO tab displays items with OPEN status badge, Dreaming tab shows empty state
